prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This report primarily discusses youth justice services and the public disorder events that occurred in England, where the YJS operates under specific legislation and frameworks applicable to England and Wales. It does not focus on any distinct factors relevant to Scotland's legal or youth justice systems.
